roles.jd_excerpt: Synthetic posting for demo use. Own claims-workflow discovery with operations and underwriting, map current-state processes, write BRDs and user stories, build SQL-backed analysis of claim cycle times, and specify dashboards for leadership. Partner with engineering through UAT and implementation handoff. No real employer or candidate data is represented.
roles.cl_preview: Dear Hiring Team at Northstar Mutual, this synthetic draft demonstrates tone and structure for the Senior Business Analyst, Claims Automation role without using private candidate history.
roles.tailored_resume_diff_preview:
• Mapped claims intake and settlement processes with operations stakeholders.
• Wrote BRDs and user stories for workflow automation releases.
• Built SQL analyses of cycle times and specified leadership dashboards.
